subcodes.first_line: O thou who art dear to 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Thy detailed letter hath been received and its contents have been noted. It was observed that the matter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز عبدالبهاء نامه مفصل شما رسید و تفاصیل معلوم گردید ملاحظه شد که مسئله
subcodes.subjects: @elections, @non-participation in politics, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
